# services.rutorrent

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.rutorrent`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.rutorrent.dataDir` | `string` | Storage path of ruTorrent. |
| `services.rutorrent.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable ruTorrent. |
| `services.rutorrent.group` | `string` | Group which runs the ruTorrent service. |
| `services.rutorrent.hostName` | `string` | FQDN for the ruTorrent instance. |
| `services.rutorrent.nginx.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable nginx virtual host management. Further nginx configuration can be done by adapting <literal>services.nginx.virtualHosts.\<name></literal>. See <xref linkend="opt-services.nginx.virtualHosts"/> for further information. |
| `services.rutorrent.nginx.exposeInsecureRPC2mount` | `boolean` | If you do not enable one of the <literal>rpc</literal> or <literal>httprpc</literal> plugins you need to expose an RPC mount through scgi using this option. Warning: This allow to run arbitrary commands, as the rtorrent user, so make sure to use authentification. The simplest way would be to use the <literal>services.nginx.virtualHosts.\<name>.basicAuth</literal> option. |
| `services.rutorrent.plugins` | `list of (string or package)` | List of plugins to enable. See the list of <link xlink:href="https://github.com/Novik/ruTorrent/wiki/Plugins#currently-there-are-the-following-plugins">available plugins</link>. Note: the <literal>unpack</literal> plugin needs the nonfree <literal>unrar</literal> package. You need to either enable one of the <literal>rpc</literal> or <literal>httprpc</literal> plugin or enable the <xref linkend="opt-services.rutorrent.nginx.exposeInsecureRPC2mount"/> option. |
| `services.rutorrent.poolSettings` | `attribute set of (string or signed integer or boolean)` | Options for ruTorrent's PHP pool. See the documentation on <literal>php-fpm.conf</literal> for details on configuration directives. |
| `services.rutorrent.rpcSocket` | `string` | Path to rtorrent rpc socket. |
| `services.rutorrent.user` | `string` | User which runs the ruTorrent service. |
